name: Giant Spider
description: A massive spider with a hairy, segmented body and venomous fangs. Its web-covered lair suggests it has claimed this collapsed passage as its hunting ground.

attacks.name: Venomous Bite
attacks.description: A poisonous bite that can cause ongoing damage

attacks.name: Web Shot
attacks.description: Spits webbing to immobilize a target (restrains, no immediate damage)

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.description: Can move freely through webbed areas without penalty

special_abilities.name: Poison Fangs
special_abilities.description: Bite attacks may inflict poison damage over time (1d4 poison for 2 rounds)

behavior.notes: Ambushes from webs. Uses web shot to immobilize targets, then closes for venomous bites. Will retreat to lair if badly wounded.
